examples.title: Algorithm: Multidimensional Array Access
examples.description: Demonstrates accessing elements in a multidimensional array
examples.code:
ALGORITHM accessMultidimensionalArray
INPUT: array, row, column
OUTPUT: element at array[row][column]

BEGIN
 element = array[row][column]
 RETURN element
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of accessing elements in a multidimensional array

examples.title: Python: Multidimensional Array Example
examples.description: Creates a 2D array and accesses its elements
examples.code:
matrix = [[1, 2, 3], [4, 5, 6]]
print(matrix[0][1]) # Output: 2
matrix[1][2] = 10
print(matrix) # Output: [[1, 2, 3], [4, 5, 10]]
examples.explanation: Key implementation details and how it relates to the concept
